nasb.text: Pharaoh’s chariots and his army He has cast into the sea; And the choicest of his officers are drowned in the Red Sea.

esv.text: “Pharaoh’s chariots and his host he cast into the sea, and his chosen officers were sunk in the Red Sea.

cnv.text: 他把法老的馬車和軍兵都投在海裡，法老特選的官長都沉在紅海中。

ccb.text: 祂把法老的战车和全军都抛进海中， 法老的优秀将领都葬身于红海，
